response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK c1
ATTR c1 : varchar : PK
ATTR c2 : varchar
ATTR c3 : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status_label : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrew
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_id, status_date, status_time
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_time : time : PK

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 2 : FK=departure_airport_code, FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrew -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightCrew -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL Passenger -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
